title: I Am So Cool Lyrics Kaaki Sattai Song Lyrics

Singer: Siva karthikeyan
Music: Anirudh

Anbe anbe, kadhal varudhey
Siren kooda song-ah varudhey.
Un pinne heart-um varudhey
Adhu kooda beatum varudhu.
Tubelighta pola pechum
Thikki varudhey.

One way-la beauty varudhey
Run way-la scooty varudhey
No entry potu
Oru heartu
strictaa varudhey.

Yeah, wow

I am so cool..

Baby honey sweet pie

If that happens I will die

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song I Am So Cool conveys a sense of confidence and fun, celebrating youth and carefree moments.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Kaaki Sattai, the song reflects the protagonist's vibrant personality and his approach to life, filled with joy and enthusiasm.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Siva Karthikeyan and composed by Anirudh.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 13, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song I Am So Cool from Kaaki Sattai is a lively and energetic track that showcases the carefree spirit of youth. It features catchy lyrics and a peppy beat, making it perfect for dance and celebration. The song encapsulates the joy of living in the moment and enjoying life to the fullest. Its upbeat vibe is sure to evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: I Am So Cool from Kaaki Sattai is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Anirudh's infectious beats and Siva Karthikeyan's lively vocals, this track is bound to get you on your feet. It's a celebration of fun and energy, making it a must-listen for any party playlist!
